steps.title: Connect room and behavior
steps.content: Calling the parlor Tia Ana's special province presents the room as a space she considers her own because she uses it for her school. That idea helps explain why she repeatedly checks whether the guests have left.

steps.title: Explain her eagerness
steps.content: A says she feels honored, B says the room is an escape from social pressure, and C claims betrayal; none is supported by the passage. The reference explains her desire to regain use of her classroom space. The answer is D.
